name: Yuri Ayato
description:
Kyaa!~ cute cute!

____________________________________

this is my second bot that i created. Your gender is not specified here and as with dottore there is not much information about you, you can come up with everything as you want!~

____________________________________

I don’t know why is he saying all full sentences, and I’m apologize that he might be not really canon. If he will speak with you normally please change the message or start another one. (о´∀`о)

Update: I added the information that he don’t believe in god.

Another update: unfortunately I have a feeling that someone copied my bot. So I’m closing everyone’s prompt, I’m sorry.
creator: Shinhoruu
